label: MOF Portal Manfaat benefits
description: Search the official MOF benefits portal for individual and family aid.
query: site:manfaat.mof.gov.my bantuan individu keluarga B40 Belanjawan 2026
descriptionBm: Cari portal rasmi manfaat MOF untuk bantuan individu dan keluarga.

label: STR / SARA official support
description: Search official STR and SARA cash and essential goods support.
query: site:bantuantunai.hasil.gov.my OR site:sara.gov.my STR SARA kelayakan 2026
descriptionBm: Cari sokongan tunai STR dan barangan asas SARA daripada sumber rasmi.

label: JKM welfare support
description: Search JKM monthly welfare assistance programmes.
query: site:jkm.gov.my bantuan bulanan kanak-kanak warga emas OKU penjagaan
descriptionBm: Cari program bantuan bulanan Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat.

label: Education and student aid
description: Search student, B40, and OKU education assistance.
query: site:mohe.gov.my OR site:bkoku.mohe.gov.my OR site:manfaat.mof.gov.my bantuan pelajar B40 OKU
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan pendidikan untuk pelajar, B40, dan OKU.

label: Employment and income support
description: Search employment, income, gig worker, and contribution-related support.
query: site:perkeso.gov.my OR site:myfuturejobs.gov.my OR site:kwsp.gov.my OR site:manfaat.mof.gov.my bantuan pekerjaan pendapatan B40
descriptionBm: Cari sokongan pekerjaan, pendapatan, pekerja gig, dan caruman.

label: Healthcare aid
description: Search healthcare support for B40 households.
query: site:moh.gov.my OR site:pekab40.com.my OR site:manfaat.mof.gov.my bantuan kesihatan B40 STR
descriptionBm: Cari sokongan kesihatan untuk isi rumah B40.

label: Housing aid
description: Search housing and home assistance for B40 households.
query: site:spnb.com.my OR site:manfaat.mof.gov.my bantuan perumahan B40 Rumah Mesra Rakyat
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan perumahan dan kediaman untuk isi rumah B40.

label: State-level aid
query: site:selangor.gov.my OR site:penang.gov.my OR site:johor.gov.my OR site:sabah.gov.my OR site:sarawak.gov.my bantuan rakyat B40

label: Custom search
description: Admin enters a custom official-source search query.
descriptionBm: Admin memasukkan pertanyaan carian sumber rasmi tersuai.
